## Type

<!-- Check one. This determines what's required below. -->

- [ ] **Bug fix** — no spec required
- [ ] **Docs / typo** — no spec required
- [ ] **Refactor** — no spec required (behavior unchanged)
- [ ] **Feature** — spec required (see below)

## Spec Artifacts (features only)

<!-- If this is a feature PR, check that these exist in specs/NNN-feature-name/ -->

- [ ] `spec.md` — approved specification
- [ ] `plan.md` — implementation plan
- [ ] `tasks.md` — task breakdown
- [ ] Branch named `NNN-feature-name` (e.g., `007-namespace-git-export`)
